g.title: Base class for all ROSS elements
Base class for bearings and seals Coefficients: kxx, kxy, kyx, kyy, cxx, cxy, cyx, cyy Supports constant or speed-dependent coefficients
Base class for seals Same coefficients as BearingElement but with seal (sealing) semantics
Bearing with fluid flow calculation Coefficients computed from fluid properties and geometry
Ball bearing Parameters: number of balls, diameter, contact angle, preload
Roller bearing Parameters: number of rollers, diameter, length, radial clearance
Active magnetic bearing (AMB) Parameters: magnetic stiffness, controller gains
Cylindrical bearing with fluid flow calculation
Squeeze film damper Parameters: clearance, viscosity, length, radius
Hydrodynamic journal bearing Pressure distribution calculation, eccentricity and attitude angle
Tilting pad bearing Parameters: number of pads, preload, offset, clearance, lubricant
Thrust bearing (axial) Stiffness and damping in the Z direction
Labyrinth seal Parameters: number of teeth, clearance, pitch, tooth height Calculates leakage and dynamic coefficients
Hole pattern seal Parameters: hole diameter and depth, distribution For centrifugal compressors
Hybrid seal (labyrinth + hole-pattern) Combines labyrinth sections with hole-pattern sections
